entry.title: Addressing the Diminishing Block Subsidy
entry.summary: The discussion emphasizes the importance of addressing miner revenue not only through external projects but also within consensus rules to maintain a stable income for miners. The acknowledgment of various projects aiming to supplement miners' revenue highlights a community-driven effort towards sustaining the cryptocurrency ecosystem. However, it stresses the need for parallel efforts that integrate solutions directly into consensus mechanisms, ensuring long-term viability and stability in miner income. This approach suggests a balanced strategy combining innovative external initiatives with fundamental protocol-level adjustments to better support the economic foundation of mining activities.
